facility.purpose: Working capital revolver — seasonal inventory build (Q3 draw) ahead of Q4 peak selling season; support for 3 new store openings planned for FY2026
facility.repayment_source: Q4 seasonal cash conversion; projected FCF $5.6M FY2026

collateral.description: Inventory (merchandise, eligible per borrowing base certificate)
Accounts receivable (B2B outfitting only; excludes consumer CC)

proposed_covenants.name: Minimum DSCR
proposed_covenants.known_concern: Projected Q3 trough DSCR 1.18 — below proposed 1.25 floor before Q4 recovery

covenant_projection_concern.concern: Seasonal trough in Q3 (Aug–Oct) is projected to produce a trailing-12-month DSCR of approximately 1.18, breaching the proposed 1.25 floor before Q4 cash conversion restores compliance
covenant_projection_concern.suggested_resolution: Structure covenant with Q3 step-down to 1.10, reverting to 1.25 after January 31 each year, OR test DSCR on fiscal-year-end basis only

demo_note: SYNTHETIC DATA — no real PII — designed to produce return-for-revision on covenant structure
